MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-12-2007 IN 206, COUNSEL APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT SPECIALLY APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF BRADLEY REISS' MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 11/5/07 IS CONTINUED TO 3/17/08 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT. DISCOVERY ACCORDING TO THE NEW TRIAL DATE. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: DAVID L. BALLATI, CLERK: DLOK, REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON DEC-19-2007 IN DEPT. 206, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS HEARD TODAY. THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE MOTION. MOTION IS CONTINUED FROM DEC-19-2007 TO MASTER CALENDAR MOTION AT FEB-13-2008, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206, TO SET A TRIAL DATE. PLAINTIFF IS TO BE PRESENT. TRIAL DATE OF 3/17/08 AND MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OF 2/27/08 ARE VACATED. DISCOVERY TO REMAIN OPEN. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON; CLERK: DLOK/EBURA; REPORTER: LETICIA PEREZ, CSR #7782(206)
MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-17-2008 VACATED. (206)
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-27-2008 VACATED. (206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-13-2008 IN 206, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WAS GRANTED AND TRIAL DATE OF 3/17/08 WAS VACATED ON 12/19/07. TODAY'S HEARING IS TO SET THE TRIAL DATE. THE NEW TRIAL DATE IS SET ON 8/18/08 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND NOTICE MAILED BY THE COURT. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT AN ORDER. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E.BURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)
